grant_and_term.grant: Non-exclusive franchise to operate one SWEAT440 Studio at Authorized Location using Marks, Patents, System
grant_and_term.renewal: 2 additional 5-year terms; must sign then-current FA (may have materially different terms); $10,000 successor fee; general release; remodel; 6-9 months advance notice; refresher training; all compliance requirements met
grant_and_term.no_subfranchising: May not subfranchise or sublicense any rights
grant_and_term.protected_territory: Lesser of 3-mile radius or 50,000 people — exclusive only if in compliance
grant_and_term.designated_search_area: Non-exclusive; 180 days to find approved site or FA may be terminated

fee_obligations.royalty: Greater of 7% of weekly Gross Sales or $350/week, due each Wednesday by EFT
fee_obligations.software_license: $695/month, subject to change on written notice
fee_obligations.local_advertising_minimum: $1,200/month (up to $2,300); additional $1,000 first 6 months and during sales decline
fee_obligations.interest_on_late_payments: Greater of 1.5%/month or max legal rate
fee_obligations.liquidated_damages: Trailing 12-month annualized fees (royalty + tech + brand fund) / 12 × lesser of 36 or remaining months

site_selection_construction.site_approval: Franchisor must approve location in writing; 180-day deadline
site_selection_construction.lease_approval: Cannot sign lease until franchisor consents in writing and Lease Addendum signed
site_selection_construction.designated_architect: Must use franchisor's designated architect for blueprint drawings
site_selection_construction.designated_project_manager: Must use franchisor-designated construction manager (currently Cresa or Build'M)
site_selection_construction.designated_site_specialist: Must use franchisor-designated site location specialist (currently Sabor Life)
site_selection_construction.construction_plans: Must submit to franchisor before construction begins and during construction
site_selection_construction.ada_compliance: Franchisee solely responsible for ADA and all code compliance
site_selection_construction.pre_opening_sales: Must meet pre-opening sales requirements before franchisor grants opening approval

training_operational_obligations.initial_training: Operating Principal and Studio Manager must attend and complete to franchisor's satisfaction; 3-5 days in Miami or virtually
training_operational_obligations.supplemental_training: Up to 5 days/year may be required; reasonable fee charged
training_operational_obligations.studio_manager_requirement: Must have approved Studio Manager at all times; 30-day replacement deadline on death/disability/departure
training_operational_obligations.operating_principal: If entity, must have Operating Principal active in oversight with signing authority
training_operational_obligations.operations_manual: Must follow; franchisor may update at any time at franchisee's expense
training_operational_obligations.quality_assurance_audits: Unannounced; score below 90 = default; 2 scores below 90 in 12 months = termination right
training_operational_obligations.computer_system: Must use designated system; franchisor has unlimited data access including Customer Data
training_operational_obligations.reporting: Must maintain records per Operations Manual; submit financial reports as required
training_operational_obligations.insurance: CGL $1M/$2M, professional liability, EPL $1M/$2M, umbrella $3M, workers comp, property, business income — must name franchisor as additional insured
training_operational_obligations.remodeling: Must remodel within 90 days of notice to then-current standards; scope from painting to full refurbishment

curable_defaults.general_operational: 30 days from written notice (failure to open, complete training, comply with System, submit reports, unauthorized assignment, etc.)
curable_defaults.cross_default_acceleration: 10 days if default under another agreement results in acceleration of $200,000+ debt

non_curable_defaults: 3+ violations in 12 months (whether or not previously cured)
Felony conviction or crime harming reputation
Government action injuring goodwill of Marks
Insolvency or assignment for benefit of creditors
Operation results in threat to public health or safety
Audit understatement of Gross Sales by 5%+ (no cure)
Sales minimums missed 2+ times in 12 months
Termination of MUD or any other agreement

conditions: Transferee completes training and pays training fee
Transferee assumes existing FA or signs then-current form
Transfer fee paid (25% of then-current IFF for single unit)
Franchisee signs non-compete and general release
transfer_restrictions.right_of_first_refusal: Franchisor can match any bona fide offer; 30 days to exercise; 60 days to close; may substitute cash for non-cash consideration
transfer_restrictions.death_disability: Estate must assign to approved buyer within 6 months
transfer_restrictions.material_interest_threshold: 20% or more ownership change requires approval

cross_default.description: Any default by franchisee, affiliates, or guarantors under any other agreement with franchisor/affiliates is deemed default under this Agreement
cross_default.scope: Includes FA, MUD, guaranty, and any other agreement

during_term.scope: No involvement with any business offering fitness classes/instruction, exercise apparel/accessories, or competitive/similar business

post_term.geographic: 15 miles of Studio or within 15 miles of any then-existing SWEAT440 studio
post_term.includes_ecommerce: E-commerce serving customers within 15-mile radius is covered
post_term.tolling: Duration tolled during breach period and enforcement proceedings

noncompete.injunctive_relief: Franchisor may seek injunctive relief without posting bond

guaranty.scope: All Principal Owners (5%+ interest) must sign Guaranty and Assumption of Obligations
guaranty.nature: Personal guaranty — joint and several liability for all franchisee obligations
guaranty.operating_principal_studio_manager: Must sign confidentiality and non-compete agreements

liquidated_damages.formula: ((Royalty + Technology + Brand Fund fees over prior 12 months) / 12) × lesser of (36 or months remaining in Initial Term)
liquidated_damages.trigger: Franchise Agreement terminated prior to end of initial term
liquidated_damages.characterization: FDD states 'not a penalty' but rather attempt to calculate lost future revenue
liquidated_damages.annualized_if_less_than_12_months: If Studio open less than 12 months, annualized; if not open, uses minimum fees

venue_dispute_resolution.venue: State or federal court in Florida (where corporate HQ located). Franchisor may also sue in state where Studio is located.
venue_dispute_resolution.attorneys_fees: Non-prevailing party pays all costs and reasonable attorneys' fees
venue_dispute_resolution.limitation_of_actions: Any claim related to Agreement must be commenced within 1 year of discovery

types: Commercial general liability ($1,000,000 per occurrence / $2,000,000 aggregate)
Employment practices liability ($1,000,000 per occurrence / $2,000,000 aggregate)
insurance_requirements.additional_insured: Franchisor and affiliates must be named
insurance_requirements.failure_penalty: Franchisor may obtain insurance and charge franchisee + 5% administrative fee

indemnification.franchisee_indemnifies_franchisor: Against all losses, liabilities, damages from Studio operation, except franchisor's own negligence or willful misconduct
indemnification.must_pay_regardless_of: Settlement, actions, defense undertaken by franchisor

force_majeure.description: Failure to perform due to causes beyond control and without negligence is not breach
force_majeure.condition: Must use reasonable best efforts to perform as soon as possible

distinctive_unusual_clauses.description: Must allow all members from any SWEAT440 studio to attend classes at your studio 'with a reduced amount to the customer and without any reimbursement to you'
distinctive_unusual_clauses.impact: Cost-shifting from system-wide members to individual franchisee; no offsetting revenue
Royalty floor of $18,200/year even if Studio generates zero revenue

distinctive_unusual_clauses.description: Royalty begins at earlier of Studio opening or opening deadline — meaning you pay even if Studio hasn't opened on time
distinctive_unusual_clauses.impact: Creates fee exposure before revenue generation if construction delays occur

distinctive_unusual_clauses.description: No contractual limitations on franchisor's right to access operational, financial, and Customer Data
distinctive_unusual_clauses.impact: Complete information asymmetry; franchisor sees all franchisee performance data in real time

distinctive_unusual_clauses.description: If you are a corporation/LLC/partnership, you may not engage in any business other than SWEAT440 studio ownership/operation (under MUD)
distinctive_unusual_clauses.impact: Prevents franchisee entity from diversifying business activities

distinctive_unusual_clauses.clause: Management fee on Studio Manager vacancy
distinctive_unusual_clauses.description: If Studio Manager not replaced within 30 days, franchisor appoints manager at greater of $2,000/week or 20% of Gross Sales
distinctive_unusual_clauses.impact: Potentially punitive management fee during vacancy; franchisor may cease providing management at any time
